title: Pathfinder Studios
summary: Leading design and operations for a digital studio. Brand evolution, website rebuild, ops innovation.
overview: As Design Director, I lead marketing initiatives, manage designers, develop new business, and work directly with the CEO on product development and creative direction.
approach:
We rebuilt the website from scratch, pushing Webflow to its limits. The new brand takes inspiration from NASA and Ghost in the Shell for a modern space agency feel. We created a powerful homepage scroll experience with micro-animations throughout.

I also built an RFP proposal engine that lets us create 12-page bespoke proposals in as little as 5 hours.
outcome: The rebrand positioned Pathfinder as innovators. The new system dramatically increased our speed and quality of client proposals.
